tagline: Offer yourself beyond limitations — experience the power of a consecrated space and deepen your sadhana.

offerings.title: Sadhguru Sannidhi — Sadhana Seva Trip
offerings.description: Travel together from Electronic City and spend time in sadhana and seva at Sannidhi. A simple possibility to be involved and experience the space more deeply.
details: 🌼 Offer yourself beyond limitations, Experience the power of a consecrated space, and Deepen your sadhana.
🚌 Free bus service is arranged for this sacred journey
📍 Departure: 25th April Morning 🌅
📍 Return: 26th April Evening 🌇
🚏 Boarding Points: Chandapura Circle – 5:15am, DMart Electronic City – 5:30am, Koodlu Gate Metro – 5:35am, Bommanahalli Metro – 5:40am
RSVP and register to confirm your participation
Join the WhatsApp group for coordination and updates

offerings.title: Save Soil Walkathon
offerings.description: A walkathon in support of the Save Soil movement. Walk together, raise awareness, and be part of a conscious effort for the planet.
details: Route: Hosa Road Junction (Sri Chennakeshava School) → Central Jail Parappana Agrahara
Wear comfortable walking shoes
Carry a water bottle

offerings.title: Surya Kriya — Hatha Yoga Offerings
offerings.description: A powerful yogic practice to align the system with the sun cycles. Open for both new participants and those wishing to refresh their practice as a volunteer.
details: 4 consecutive classes — attendance on all days is required
No prior yoga experience needed
Open to new participants and refreshers
Can join as a volunteer to refresh the practice and support the sessions

offerings.title: Yogasanas — Hatha Yoga Offerings
offerings.description: Classical yogasanas to bring stability and ease to the system. A supportive space to deepen one's practice. Open for both new participants and those wishing to refresh their practice as a volunteer.
details: 5 consecutive evenings — all sessions are mandatory
No prior yoga experience needed
Open to new participants and refreshers
Can join as a volunteer to refresh the practice and support the sessions

offerings.title: Bhuta Shuddhi — Hatha Yoga Offerings
offerings.description: A powerful process of elemental cleansing, creating balance and inner stability. Open for both new participants and those wishing to refresh their practice as a volunteer.
details: Bhuta Shuddhi Kit will be provided to participants
No prior yoga experience needed
Open to new participants and refreshers
Can join as a volunteer to refresh the practice and support the sessions

offerings.title: Monthly Satsang — May
offerings.description: A space to come together, sit, practice, and simply be in the presence of sangha.

offerings.title: Angamardana — Hatha Yoga Offerings
offerings.description: A dynamic system to build strength, flexibility, and resilience in the body. Dates and timings to be confirmed.

offerings.title: Children's Yoga — Hatha Yoga Offerings
offerings.description: Offering yoga for children to support balance, focus, and wellbeing from a young age. Dates and timings to be confirmed.

offerings.title: Inner Engineering — 7-Day (Kannada)
offerings.description: Inner Engineering is a 7-day program that offers tools for inner wellbeing through guided meditations and practices.
details: 7 consecutive days — participation on all days is required
Wed - Sat & Mon - Tue Morning 06:00AM to 09:00AM Or Evening 06:00PM to 09:00PM Sunday Full Day 07:00AM to 05:00PM
First time offered in Kannada in Electronic City

offerings.title: Guru Pooja Program
offerings.description: Guru Pooja is a process to establish a connection with the source of creation.
details: Learn the Guru Pooja process step by step
Open to new participants and refreshers
Being offered in Electronic City for the first time

recentHappenings.title: Monthly Satsang — April
recentHappenings.description: Around 60 participants joined for Satsang across both locations.

recentHappenings.title: Inner Engineering Completion Program
recentHappenings.description: 71 participants initiated into Shambhavi Mahamudra Kriya. 40 volunteers offered support and relived their Inner Engineering experience.

recentHappenings.title: Shambhavi Meetup — Electronic City
recentHappenings.description: Around 50 participants came together to refresh their practice and spend time in sangha.
